public_reputation: Known around Sealwater Conclave through day-to-day work as faith-culture liaison.
manner: Treats custom as live infrastructure and corrects social missteps before they harden into offense. In Sealwater Conclave, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of faith-culture liaison in and around Sealwater Conclave, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Sealwater Conclave workable through the obligations of faith-culture liaison while managing the immediate pressure of agenda backlog, precedence disputes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of faith-culture liaison credible while absorbing the strain created by agenda backlog, precedence disputes.

adventure_hooks.summary: Edrin Hearthwrit can draw the party into a locality problem centered on faith-culture liaison duties in Sealwater Conclave.
Edrin Hearthwrit becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with agenda backlog, precedence disputes around Sealwater Conclave.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Edrin Hearthwrit is immediately readable as a faith-culture liaison tied to Sealwater Conclave.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sealwater Conclave: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Edrin Hearthwrit presents as someone shaped by the duties of a faith-culture liaison and the daily pressures of Sealwater Conclave.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a faith-culture liaison, and proof that strangers will not make Sealwater Conclave harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Edrin Hearthwrit refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a faith-culture liaison too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain expected conduct and turn cultural knowledge into safe passage or trust.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Edrin Hearthwrit adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Edrin Hearthwrit always knows more about Sealwater Conclave than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a faith-culture liaison in Sealwater Conclave.
